free_text: Excitation functions for the production of
radionuclides by neutron-induced reactions on C, O,
Mg, Al, Si, Fe, Co, Ni, Cu, Ag, Te, Pb, and U up to
Stacked target with diameter < 2.5 cm, height < 6.6 cm
Uppsala: 1.55 deg to proton beam, 192.0 cm from 7Li
Half-lives and gamma branching ratios given
- cumulative cross sections calculated by TALYS 1.0
as prior information with 50% uncertainty and
- neutron flux calculated by LAHET normalized to
Neutron spectra were determined experimentally by time-
phi1: fluence of peak neutrons in front of the stack
phi2: fluence of peak neutrons behind the stack
On. Received by e-mail from Rolf Michel
